name: HP Boost
description: Raises maximum health before entering the run.

name: Damage Boost
description: Increases weapon damage dealt during the run.

name: Speed Boost
description: Improves initiative and action speed in combat.

name: Crit Boost
description: Raises critical strike chance for stronger bursts.

name: Block
description: Grants a chance to negate incoming attacks.

name: Double Strike
description: Adds a chance to follow up with an extra attack.
